title: The Most Important Gates in Quantum Computing Explained
summary: IBM Technology explains fundamental quantum computing gates, including Hadamard and CNOT gates, and their role in quantum circuits. The content covers qubits, superposition, and entanglement as foundational concepts for understanding quantum computation.
